CVE-2018-18245.title: Nagios Core 4.4.2 has XSS via the alert summary reports of plugin ...
CVE-2018-18245.description: Nagios Core 4.4.2 has XSS via the alert summary reports of plugin results, as demonstrated by a SCRIPT element delivered by a modified check_load plugin to NRPE.

CVE-2020-13977.title: Nagios 4.4.5 allows an attacker, who already has administrative a ...
CVE-2020-13977.description: Nagios 4.4.5 allows an attacker, who already has administrative access to change the "URL for JSON CGIs" configuration setting, to modify the Alert Histogram and Trends code via crafted versions of the archivejson.cgi, objectjson.cgi, and statusjson.cgi files. NOTE: this vulnerability has been mistakenly associated with CVE-2020-1408.

CVE-2020-35269.title: Nagios Core application version 4.2.4 is vulnerable to Site-Wide  ...
CVE-2020-35269.description: Nagios Core application version 4.2.4 is vulnerable to Site-Wide Cross-Site Request Forgery (CSRF) in many functions, like adding – deleting for hosts or servers.

CVE-2022-38250.description: Nagios XI v5.8.6 was discovered to contain a SQL injection vulnerability via the mib_name parameter at the Manage MIBs page.
